violations.text: The facility does not have a designated hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sink must be installed and located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. PIC stated hand sink to be installed within a week. Plumber called same day. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024

Wood that is untreated/unsealed is used in the construction of shelf unit to mount the small hot water tank. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2024
